assumptions: The intragroup dividend has been declared and has created a recognized monetary receivable/payable denominated in a foreign currency.
The related foreign exchange differences affect consolidated profit or loss rather than being fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies a recognized asset or liability as an eligible hedged item under IFRS 9, including certain intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.
